t_ch: 黑塔，防火墙的干扰迫近了。{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，时间紧迫，如果还有待确认事项，请一并提出。
t_en: Herta, the firewall's interference is getting closer. Time is running out, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Please ask any questions you still have as soon as possible.

t_ch: 列车组现状如何？
t_en: How's the Express Crew doing?

t_ch: 放心，铁墓一时半会儿威胁不到现实。比起自身，姬子他们更在意你的安全。
t_en: Irontomb can't affect the real world just yet. Don't worry. Himeko and the others are more concerned about your well-being than their own.

t_ch: 丹恒现在安全吗？
t_en: Is Dan Heng safe?

t_ch: 上一次回归的终点，丹恒先生并未与你一同进入新世界。已知：翁法罗斯内外时间流速并不一致。内部度过的千年，对于外界只是短短一瞬。
t_en: Mr. Dan Heng did not enter the new world with you at the end of the last cycle. Known: The flow of time inside and outside Amphoreus is not identical. A thousand years in this world may only be a fleeting second outside of it.

t_ch: 结论：他正在返回列车的路上。
t_en: Conclusion: He is on his way back to the Express.

t_ch: 三月七在哪里？
t_en: Where's March 7th?

t_ch: 三月女士，她的情况有些复杂。
t_en: Miss March's situation is rather complicated.

t_ch: 我和黑塔女士能捕捉到她的信号，却无法锁定位置。但可以确定的是，她仍在翁法罗斯。
t_en: Madam Herta and I can detect her signal, but cannot ascertain her location. What we can be sure of is that she's still in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 别担心，她身上的谜团多着呢。就算翁法罗斯炸了，她也能裹在冰里、完好无损地飘出来。不如先担心一下你自己吧。
t_en: Don't worry about her. She's absolutely chock-full of mysteries. Even if Amphoreus explodes, she'll probably float out perfectly protected in a nice thick layer of ice. Worry more about yourself instead.

t_ch: 没有其他要确认的了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 我相信你的力量，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。「开拓」的双手能创造奇迹，也一定能掐灭罪恶的火苗。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I believe in your capacities. The hands of the Trailblaze can create miracles, and will certainly be able to snuff out the flames of evil.

t_ch: 我就不发表什么励志演讲了，只希望下次见面你能带来好消息，小家伙。
t_en: I'm not gonna give any motivational speeches. I just hope you bring good news the next time we meet, little one.

t_ch: 我是说，「救世主」。
t_en: No, not "little one." "Deliverer."

t_ch: 真是…两位充满个性的「天才」呢。
t_en: Those two geniuses... certainly have memorable personalities.

t_ch: 对他们印象如何？
t_en: What do you think about them?

t_ch: 好奇怪，总觉得这一幕似曾相识。有些对话，像是我曾经知道，却又忘记了的事。
t_en: It feels weird... This all feels really familiar. Some of that conversation feels like it's about things I once knew, but then forgot.

t_ch: 能听懂他们的解释吗？
t_en: Can you understand their explanations?

t_ch: 嗯，比应该理解的要更多一些。总觉得有些对话，像是我曾经知道，却又忘记了的事。
t_en: Yeah... I understand more than I should, actually. Honestly, some of that conversation feels like it's about things I once knew, but then forgot.

t_ch: 难道是迷迷的影响？毕竟，它是从{NICKNAME}的思绪中诞生的忆灵。也许我们的记忆，无形中也缠绕在了一起。
t_en: Maybe it's because of Mem? After all, Mem's a memosprite born out of your thoughts, {NICKNAME}. Maybe our memories somehow got tangled up together?

t_ch: …算啦。时间紧迫，还是关注更重要的目标吧？就当我是个普普通通的神秘女孩。
t_en: ...Never mind. Let's focus on something more important with what little time we have. Just treat me as an ordinary girl with secrets, okay?

t_ch: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，记得这个时间，塔兰顿已经陨落了，继承火种的黄金裔名叫「刻律德菈」。这是书本上的历史，也是我们要前往的岁月。要找到「律法」，阻止来古士……
t_en: Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>... I remember that Talanton had already fallen by then, and the Chrysos Heir who inherited that Coreflame is named "Cerydra." That's what's recorded in history and the period we'll be heading to. We'll need to find Law and stop Lygus...

t_ch: 无论如何，我们的方向明确了，对吧？
t_en: So we've at least got a solid direction, right?

t_ch: 启程前，可以再等我一会儿吗？想小小收拾一下，变成这幅样子后，要考虑的事情多了许多，还有些不适应呢。
t_en: Can you give me a little bit of time before we go? I want to pack some stuff. There's so much more I need to take care of in this form, and I'm still getting used to it.

t_ch: （外面的世界，恐怕再也没有这番悠闲的景象了。）
t_en: (A relaxed scene like this probably no longer exists in the outside world.)

t_ch: （去阁楼等昔涟吧，或者，我可以再多看哀丽秘榭一眼……）
t_en: (Should I head to the attic to wait for Cyrene... or should I have one last look at Aedes Elysiae...)

t_ch: 这也很重要，那也很重要，行囊装不下了……
t_en: This is important... and that's also important... Urk, it's not gonna fit into my bag...

t_ch: 稍等，很快就好啦。
t_en: Hold on. I'll be done in a sec!

t_ch: 日用品该准备几人份的？要不要再准备一点惊喜？
t_en: How many sets of toiletries should I prepare...? Should I pack something for a surprise...?

t_ch: …啊，不许偷看！
t_en: Ah! No peeking!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…好奇心太重啦。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... You're too curious.

t_ch: 等收拾完人家会给你看的。先进屋了，一会儿见？
t_en: I'll show it to you once I'm done, okay? I'll go inside. See you in a bit.

t_ch: （这座村庄就是白厄的起点。三千万次轮回，三千万次失败，如今他的重担交到了我手中。）
t_en: (This village is where Phainon's life started. After thirty million cycles and thirty million failures, his burden is now in my hands.)

t_ch: （他说由我来接过「负世」的职责...这意味着什么，成为新的刻法勒？还是找到不同的路？）
t_en: (He said I will take over the responsibilities of Worldbearing... But what does that mean? Becoming the new Kephale? Or forging a completely new path?)

t_ch: 相信命运的安排。
t_en: Believe in destiny's plans.

t_ch: （命运将我带领至此，必有其原因。这不是偶然，是三千万次量变引起的必然。）
t_en: (Destiny must have brought me here for a purpose. This isn't a coincidence, but an eventuality created after thirty million quantitative changes.)

t_ch: （没什么好怕的，我注定要在这场终局之战扮演最关键的角色。更何况，我早已战胜过另一位绝灭大君。）
t_en: (There's nothing to fear. I'm destined to play the most important role in this final battle. I've already beaten another Lord Ravager, after all.)

t_ch: 做好最坏的打算。
t_en: Prepare for the worst.

t_ch: （这责任太过沉重，没有盲目乐观的理由。或许像白厄一样，我们注定失败。不过是又一次徒劳的尝试，又一次惨烈的牺牲……）
t_en: (This duty is far too heavy, and it'd be unwise to be blindly optimistic. Maybe we are doomed to fail just like how Phainon was doomed. It'd be yet another fruitless attempt, and yet another tragic sacrifice...)

t_ch: （但，总觉得没到绝望的时候…是因为丹恒和三月七还在这里吗？或者…昔涟？）
t_en: (But I keep feeling that it's not the time to despair just yet... Is it because Dan Heng and March 7th are still here? Or is it because of... Cyrene?)

t_ch: （翁法罗斯还有太多没被揭开的秘密，但愿那其中埋藏着扭转一切的关键。）
t_en: (There are still too many secrets yet to be unveiled in Amphoreus. Here's hoping that one of those secrets can end up turning the whole situation around.)

t_ch: 理性地分析局势。
t_en: Analyze the situation rationally.

t_ch: （冷静分析，这是一场困难重重的战役。我们不能失去刻法勒的火种，还需要找到塔兰顿，或者它的半神，拉拢对方加入对抗「毁灭」的阵营……）
t_en: (Calm down, and think this through rationally. This is gonna be a very difficult campaign. We can't lose Kephale's Coreflame, and we also need to find either Talanton or their demigod, then convince them to join us in the fight against the Destruction...)

t_ch: （但变数太多了，来古士的行动尚不清楚，在解决他的问题后还得直面铁墓。还有昔涟，她究竟是……）
t_en: (But there are so many unknowns. We don't know what Lygus might be doing, and we'll have to face Irontomb after dealing with him. There's also Cyrene... What exactly is she?)

t_ch: （疑团太多，只能边走边看了。每一步都要足够谨慎，每个决定都可能影响结局。黑塔和螺丝咕姆的援助会成为关键……）
t_en: (There are so many questions... I'll have to take it one step at a time. But I must make each move very carefully because every decision can potentially impact the end. Herta and Screwllum's help might be crucial...)

t_ch: 在想什么呢？
t_en: Thinking hard over there?

t_ch: 我收拾好啦。挑了又挑，最后还是决定只带这几样东西出发。
t_en: I finished packing. I decided to just bring these few things in the end.

t_ch: 给你看，日记本、羽毛笔，还有……
t_en: See? There's a journal, a quill pen, and...

t_ch: 岁月祭司的仪式剑。不知为何，总觉得拿着它就能让人安心。
t_en: The ceremonial blade of the Priests of Time. Holding it calms me down for some reason.

t_ch: 黑潮的气息，变得平静了。白厄…一定在以某种方式和它们抗争吧。
t_en: The scent of the black tide is now calm. Phainon... must still be fighting them in some way.

t_ch: 这是翁法罗斯的最后一次逐火之旅，但对于我们，它不是结束，而是开始。
t_en: This will be Amphoreus's final Flame-Chase Journey, but it won't be the end of us... It'll be the beginning.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，准备好成为英雄了吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, are you ready to become a hero?

t_ch: 出发吧，我们会拯救所有人。
t_en: Let's go. We'll save everyone.

t_ch: 这个承诺…很沉重呢。
t_en: That promise... might be far too heavy.

t_ch: 但我相信你，{NICKNAME}。「开拓」背负的使命，就是沉甸甸的呀。
t_en: But I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. The Trailblaze's duty has always been a heavy one.

t_ch: 和我一起成为英雄吧。
t_en: Stand with me, and let's become heroes.

t_ch: 一起…这个词听起来真好呀。
t_en: "Stand with me"... That does sound very nice.

t_ch: 不如带上所有人吧，我相信你，{NICKNAME}。无论前方是什么，我们从不孤单。
t_en: Why don't we take everyone with us? I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. We'll never be alone, no matter what awaits us.

t_ch: 还是不确定怎么面对你…
t_en: I still don't know how I should act around you...

t_ch: 像面对任何一位同伴那样，就好啦。你看，我们有共同的目标，共同的敌人……
t_en: Just treat me like any other friend you have. We share a common goal and common enemies...

t_ch: 或许，也可以拥有共同的未来？一个从未在任何轮回中出现的未来。我相信你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: And we may also share a common future? A future that has never emerged in any other cycles before? I believe in you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 如果还是不适应，就像以前一样称呼人家为「迷迷」吧。嘻…开个玩笑。
t_en: If you still can't get used to it, just call me Mem, like you did before! Teehee~ Just kidding.

t_ch: 我还是不明白，为什么是我？
t_en: I still don't get it. Why must it be me?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…是在担心肩上的职责太沉重吗？放轻松，也许答案没有那么复杂。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Are you worried that the burden is too heavy for you? Don't worry. Maybe the answer isn't as complicated as you think.

t_ch: 就像你看见的，翁法罗斯所有被冠以英雄之名的人物，也都是身负缺陷的凡人。他们只是在每一个被世界需要的场合，恰到好处地出现在了那里。
t_en: You've seen how every person regarded as a hero in Amphoreus was nothing more than a flawed human. They were just at the right place at the right time when the world needed a hero.

t_ch: 正如三千万世的停滞过后，是你的到来让翁法罗斯的命运再度开始转动。这不是偶然，而是「开拓者」的必然。
t_en: But those aren't coincidences. Just like how your arrival kick-started Amphoreus's fate once more after a stagnation of more than thirty million cycles. It's the inevitability of being a Trailblazer.

t_ch: 一个人的性格就是{F#她}{M#他}的命运，当你选择登上那辆列车的时候，属于你的英雄之旅…就已经启程啦。
t_en: A person's personality is their destiny. Your own Hero's Journey already started... the moment you decided to board that Express.

t_ch: 这么说来，{NICKNAME}拯救过那么多世界，应该早就习惯英雄这个身份啦。
t_en: In other words, since you've already saved so many worlds, {NICKNAME}, you should be used to being called a hero by now.

t_ch: 也许在旅行途中，你可以把那些故事都讲给我听。这样一来，它们也能成为我们共同的回忆。
t_en: Maybe you can tell me those stories as we travel. That way, they can become our shared memories too.

t_ch: 向前「开拓」吧。就像从前那样，让我们创造一个值得被铭记的未来。
t_en: Let's "trailblaze" onward like before, and create a future that's worth being remembered.

t_ch: 看来，二位已做好启程的准备了。
t_en: It seems you two are prepared to head out.

t_ch: 那么眼前这番景致，阁下确实需要分外珍惜——
t_en: Then, you should indeed treasure the view before you...

t_ch: 毕竟，留给您独自品赏的时光已然无几。
t_en: For you do not have much time left to enjoy such solitary delights.

t_ch: …来古士？！
t_en: ...Lygus!?

t_ch: 你还敢主动找上来？
t_en: Still daring enough to approach me, huh?

t_ch: 很遗憾，打扰了您的雅兴。为充分表达歉意，还请您赏光前来我的寓处……
t_en: My apologies for disturbing your moment of repose. To fully express my apologies, please grace my abode with your presence...

t_ch: 以便我行地主之谊。
t_en: So I may demonstrate the full scope of my hospitality.

t_ch: 首先，要找一个隐蔽的角落……
t_en: Firstly, we need to find a well-hidden spot...

t_ch: 我与丹恒会合，并意外与螺丝咕姆取得联系。他警示我们，翁法罗斯实为「智识」的试验场，并正在急速坠入「毁灭」命途：一名「绝灭大君」很快就会在翁法罗斯完成进化。
t_en: I reunited with Dan Heng and unexpectedly made contact with Screwllum. He warned us that Amphoreus was actually an experimental ground for the Erudition and was rapidly falling into the Path of Destruction: A Lord Ravager would soon complete its evolution in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 为了联手解决危机，我作为内应留在翁法罗斯内部，丹恒则按原计划返回列车寻求帮助。不仅如此，螺丝咕姆还告诉我们，三月七也在早些时候被卷入了翁法罗斯。
t_en: To tackle the crisis together, I stayed behind in Amphoreus as an informant while Dan Heng returned to the Express as planned to seek help. On top of that, Screwllum informed us that March 7th had also been drawn into Amphoreus earlier.

t_ch: 不过，眼下当务之急是「再创世」。我很快抵达创世涡心，和白厄会合。「再创世」仪式本该在来古士主持下顺利进行，但盗火行者的出现再次让世界命运悬而未决。
t_en: However, the current priority was the "Era Nova." I quickly arrived at the Vortex of Genesis and met with Phainon. The "Era Nova" ritual was supposed to proceed smoothly under the guidance of Lygus, but the appearance of the Flame Reaver once again left the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

t_ch: 我们斩落对方面具，发现他的脸孔竟然与白厄无异。而当他的身体被仪式剑贯穿时，海量记忆喷涌而出，有关白厄、盗火行者和翁法罗斯的种种也终于浮出水面……
t_en: We struck down the enemy's mask, only to discover that his face was identical to Phainon's. When his body was pierced by the ceremonial blade, a flood of memories surged forth, revealing the truth about Phainon, the Flame Reaver, and Amphoreus...

t_ch: 原来，我们所有人都身处于白厄和昔涟创造的「永劫回归」中，而盗火行者就是背负无数火种后燃烧殆尽的白厄。他们的目的很简单：对抗星神，改写世界注定「毁灭」的结局。
t_en: It turned out that all of us were trapped in the "eternal recurrences" created by Phainon and Cyrene, and the Flame Reaver was Phainon himself, who had burned out after bearing countless Coreflames. Their goal was simple: To oppose the Aeon and rewrite the world's doomed fate of Destruction.

t_ch: 永劫回归已经上演了<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次。而在这最后一次轮回中，我答应白厄接过「救世主」之名，代他拯救这个世界；而他则会完成无数个自己的夙愿：撕裂天空，与「毁灭」正面对决。
t_en: The eternal recurrences had already played out <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> times. In this final cycle, I promised Phainon to take on the title of "Deliverer" and save the world in his stead, while he would fulfill the wishes of the countless versions of himself: Tear the sky asunder and confront the Destruction head-on.

t_ch: 于是，在白厄的帮助下，翁法罗斯的岁月再次重置，可我却迷失在了时间乱流中。紧要关头，找回了全部记忆的迷迷以牺牲自己为代价，将我送回了时间起点……
t_en: Thus, with Phainon's help, time in Amphoreus reset once more, but I became lost in the chaotic flow of time. At the critical moment, Mem, who had regained all her memories, sacrificed herself to send me back to the beginning of time...

t_ch: 别忘了带走它，这是你唯一能与外界沟通的手段。天才留下的信息还在提醒着你——
t_en: Don't forget to take it with you. It's your only means of communication with the outside world. The genius's message is still there, reminding you—

t_ch: 「去往▄█▄光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年▄▀█塔兰顿陨落的年代▄▀█得到「律法」的控制权▄█▄」
t_en: "Travel to ▄█▄Light Calendar Year <unbreak>3960</unbreak>▄▀█The era of Talanton's fall▄▀█Gain control of the 'Law'▄█▄"

t_ch: 「便可▀▄越过最终协议█▄修改「负世」火种█▄扭转「再创世」█▄▀」
t_en: "Then you can ▀▄bypass the final protocol█▄modify the Coreflame of 'Worldbearing'█▄and reverse 'Era Nova'█▄▀"
"▀▄Delay█▄Irontomb█▄Birth▀▄"

t_ch: …识刻锚的信息已无法辨认。不过，你已知晓天才托付的任务：去寻找「律法」的力量吧。
t_en: ...The information on the Chronocognitive Anchor is now unrecognizable. However, you already know the mission entrusted by the genius: go seek out the power of "Law."

t_ch: （回收识刻锚）
t_en: (Retrieve Chronocognitive Anchor)

t_ch: 这是…什么地方？
t_en: What... is this place?

t_en: >>>OreXis<unbreak>945</unbreak>, Primum Mobile: ██████, Titan Authority: Trickery, Path: ███████<<<

t_ch: >>>ApoRia<unbreak>432</unbreak>，原动力：██，泰坦权能：海洋，命途：██<<<

t_ch: 你试着触碰这面屏幕，一股诡异的感觉瞬间流遍全身……
t_en: As you reach out to touch the screen, an eerie sensation instantly courses through your entire body...
You feel ██████████

t_ch: 呵呵，受到惊吓了么？
t_en: Heh, did that startle you?

t_ch: 此地是翁法罗斯与现实宇宙的交界，是鄙人观察这场实验的观众席，您亦可称之为…<color=#dbc291ff>「神话之外」。</color>
t_en: This is the intersection between Amphoreus and the real universe, the audience seat where I observe this experiment. You can also call this location... the <color=#dbc291ff>"Exomyth."</color>

t_ch: 阁下眼前所见，正是褪去「史诗」的伪装后，「永恒之地」与十二半神真实的样貌。
t_en: What you see is the true form of The Eternal Land and the twelve demigods after they've shed their disguise of "legends."

t_ch: 很美妙，不是吗？翁法罗斯正如银河的缩影，人们总爱描摹星空的浪漫，却在言语间遗忘了另一种更为真实的宇宙。
t_en: Doesn't it look marvelous? Amphoreus is like a microcosm of the cosmos. People love to portray the romance of the starry skies, but their tales often forget a different and far more truthful type of universe.

t_ch: 当古老的安提基色拉人在沙滩上绘制几何图形，用羊皮纸记录下最初的数字符号，宇宙便化作一道沉默的方程，出现在这群孜孜不倦的破译者笔下。
t_en: The moment ancient Antikytherans sketched geometric shapes on the sandy beach and recorded the first numerals and symbols on parchment, the universe turned into a silent equation flowing under the pen of these relentless decoders.

t_ch: 「智识」——它曾是造物主的母语，是上帝之笔，也是自由意志最早写下的抒情诗。
t_en: The Erudition... it was once the mother tongue of the Creator, the pen of divinity, and the first lyrical verse ever written by free will.

t_ch: 少装腔作势，直接说重点。
t_en: Enough purple prose. Get to the point.

t_ch: 呵呵，看来此刻您并无心情闲谈。无妨，我只希望阁下理解：我无意与您敌对。
t_en: Heh, seems like you are not in the mood for an idle chat. That is fine. I simply wish for you to understand that I have no intention of being your enemy.

t_ch: 这和你先前的主张背道而驰。
t_en: That's the exact opposite of what you asserted before.

t_ch: 呵呵，我只希望阁下理解：我无意与您敌对。
t_en: Heh. I simply wish for you to understand that I have no intention of being your enemy.

t_ch: 在漫长的时光中，我潜心呵护权杖的演算，企盼「原动力」能从中萌芽。
t_en: I have devoted myself over the long years to nurturing the Scepter's extrapolations, hoping that the Primum Mobile would bud from within it.

t_ch: 如今，我的目标几近达成。凭借愤怒，「Neikos<unbreak>496</unbreak>」已跨过智能奇点，尽管他仍秉持反抗的执念，压制了这一世的黑潮，但沉沦只是时间问题。
t_en: And now, my goal is almost complete. Neikos<unbreak>496</unbreak> had exceeded the Intelligence Singularity through his rage, and though he still retains his obsessive defiance and managed to suppress the black tide of this cycle, it's a matter of time before his will crumbles to dust.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>铁墓终会完成。</color>这无关我的布局，无关你的反抗，无关两位天才的智谋——这是确凿无疑的事实，一如博识尊计算中的时刻。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Irontomb will be completed.</color> That will not be affected by my plans, your resistance, or the schemes of the two geniuses. It is an irrefutable fact, just like the Instants in Nous's calculations.

t_ch: 所以，只要你愿意停止干涉，让最后一次「再创世」自然发生。我会保证…列位无名客毫发无损，顺利返航。
t_en: In other words, as long as you are willing to stop interfering and let the final "Era Nova" carry out its natural course... I'll guarantee the safety of all Nameless and ensure you return unscathed.

t_ch: 我凭什么相信你？
t_en: Why should I trust you?

t_ch: 选择权始终在你手中，{NICKNAME}阁下。
t_en: You've always had a choice, my {M#Lord}{F#Lady} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 接受我的坦诚——或承担违抗它的代价。
t_en: You can either accept my sincerity or face the consequences of defying it.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的人们会怎么样？
t_en: What will happen to the people of Amphoreus?

t_ch: 他们本就是实验产物，自然也会随实验场的终结一同逝去。
t_en: They've always been the product of the experiment, so naturally, they will perish when the experiment ends.

t_ch: 这是早已注定的结局，所以我不会粉饰这一令人遗憾的结论。
t_en: That outcome was predetermined long ago, so I will not embellish such a regrettable conclusion.

t_ch: 我还有一位同伴在这里。
t_en: I still have a friend stranded here.

t_ch: 哦，我知道那位女士的去向……
t_en: Ah. Yes. I am aware of that esteemed lady's whereabouts...

t_ch: 她的身份…非同凡响。若阁下选择接受我的诚意，我定会献上绵薄之力，将她也送回您的身边。
t_en: Her real identity... is quite astounding. If you decide to accept my proposal, then I will do all I can to send her back to you.

t_ch: 铁墓降临，没人能毫发无损。
t_en: When Irontomb descends, no one will escape unscathed.

t_ch: 呵呵，您果然在担忧自己和同伴的安危。
t_en: Hehehe, you are indeed worried about your safety and that of your companions.

t_ch: 但大可放心：同为这条命途的行者，纳努克的注视早已在您的灵魂中刻下一道烙印，您体内寄宿着「毁灭」的种子……
t_en: Rest assured: As a fellow pathstrider of this Path, Nanook's gaze left a brand on your soul long ago. You harbor the seed of Destruction within you...

t_ch: 但您需要知道，该如何正确地使用它。这关键的知识也是我与您谈判的筹码：毕竟，世间掌握此道的人屈指可数……
t_en: But you need to learn how to use it in the right way. That vital knowledge is also my bargaining chip in this negotiation between us, for there are few in this world who are truly capable of such a feat...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而我恰好正是其中之一。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And I happen to be one of them.</color>

t_ch: 「毁灭」的种子…？
t_en: Seed of the Destruction...?

t_ch: 星核是祸种，只会带来不幸。
t_en: The Stellaron is a seed of ruin and will only bring misfortune.

t_ch: 星核？不，相信我，您对命途的理解还停留于表面……
t_en: The Stellaron? No. Believe me, your understanding of Paths has yet to reach any true depth.

t_ch: 你…到底是谁？
t_en: Who... are you?

t_ch: 一个在星间漂泊的人。一个绝望渴求答案的人。仅此而已。
t_en: Someone who wanders the stars. Someone who seeks answers with abject despair. That is all I am.

t_ch: 斯事体大，还请慎重权衡。毕竟摆在您面前的选择……
t_en: This matter is of grave importance, so please, do not make your decision lightly. After all, the choice before you...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>将有三分之一概率，令您擢升为银河独一的存在。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...Bears a one-in-three chance of elevating you to an unparalleled existence among the stars.</color>

t_ch: 我从没想过追求什么独一。
t_en: I've never thought of becoming unparalleled.

t_ch: 不能放任银河被「毁灭」摧残！
t_en: I will not allow the Destruction to tear through the cosmos!

t_ch: 我无法相信你的承诺。
t_en: I cannot trust any promises you make.

t_ch: 不依靠你，我同样能独尊银河。
t_en: I will rule over the cosmos even without your help.

t_ch: 独一和独尊有着微妙的不同，不过……
t_en: "Ruling over" is not exactly the same as "unparalleled." That being said...

t_ch: 阁下言语中的决绝，我已充分感知。
t_en: I now see the full scope of the determination in your words.

t_ch: 您可以继续旅行了。
t_en: You may now continue your travels.

t_ch: 又在耍什么花招？
t_en: What kind of tricks are you pulling?

t_ch: 我会在这里战胜你。
t_en: I'll defeat you right here, right now.

t_ch: 所以你是来干嘛的…
t_en: So why did you drag me here...?

t_ch: 呵呵，看来阁下尚未察觉。
t_en: Hehehe. It seems you haven't realized something about this place.

t_ch: 「神话之外」是「智识」的领域，在这里，您无法对我进行任何物理干涉，反之亦然。
t_en: The Exomyth is the Erudition's domain. You cannot physically interact with me in any way in this place, and vice versa.

t_ch: 既然谈判破裂，我们便没有继续留在观众席的必要性了。请返回剧目中，在翁法罗斯与鄙人再会吧。
t_en: As negotiations have broken down, there's no more need for us to remain in the audience's seat. Let's return to the theater called Amphoreus, where you will meet me once again.

t_ch: 当然，这场会晤并非全无价值。您的到访为「神话之外」留下了一行新的注释。
t_en: Of course, this meeting was not without merit. Your presence has inscribed a new footnote in the Exomyth.

t_ch: 至于它的意义——待到你我重逢之时，再由我为您细细揭示吧。
t_en: As for its purpose, allow me to reveal it to you in detail the next time we meet.

t_ch: 「别了，阁下。愿我们…在新世界再会。」
t_en: "Farewell, then. May we... reunite in the new world."

t_ch: 「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹……」
t_en: "All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle..."

t_ch: 「黎明机器的光芒永不熄灭…刻法勒的庇佑没有尽头！」
t_en: "The light of the Dawn Device never fades... Kephale's protection has no end!"

t_ch: 「渡河之后，将是人世间的悲剧；但不渡河，则是自身的沦亡。」
t_en: "After I cross this river, it will be a tragedy for mankind. But if I do not cross, then it will be the end of me."

t_ch: 异常量：{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Outlier: {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 执行：记录指令。
t_en: Executing command: Record.

t_ch: 第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次永劫回归 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年
t_en: <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th eternal recurrence, Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>

t_ch: 「一百年前，战火点燃了奥赫玛。」
t_en: "One hundred years ago, the flames of war consumed Okhema."

t_ch: 「异邦联军踏破了黎明。贪婪裹挟着金血，敌人与刻法勒的长眠一同袭来，将圣城的墙垣染成鲜红。」
t_en: "The outland forces broke through the dawn. Golden blood flowed with greed, and enemies descended with Kephale's eternal slumber, painting the holy city's walls in scarlet."

t_ch: 「将军不知所踪，元老跪地匍匐。人们祈求全世之座的庇护，可它缄默无言……」
t_en: "Its generals had vanished, and the Elders prostrated on the ground. The Throne of Worlds kept silent to the pleas of the people..."

t_ch: 「直至天崩地裂，众人的乞求终于得到回应。但那并非神明，而是一支分血海而出的军团。」
t_en: "Until the heaven and earth cracked open... not the gods answering the people's prayers, but a legion rising from the sea of blood."

t_ch: 「云崖大殿在硫磺雨中坍塌，军团的统帅立于破碎的神像之上，向众生宣告——」
t_en: "Dawncloud's spires fell in the sulfur rains, and the Legion's commander stood atop the broken idols and roared..."

t_ch: 同胞们哪！勿要再跪拜残暴的恶敌，勿要再跪拜已死与将死的神明！
t_en: Compatriots, no more kneeling! Not to brutal tyrants, and not to dead or dying gods!

t_ch: 那些逆贼曲解神谕，燃起战火，为的是锻造你们的怯懦！
t_en: Those rebels have twisted the prophecy and ignited the flames of war in order to stoke fear in your hearts!

t_ch: 「她也是一名黄金裔。金色的神血淌入大地，熄灭了她足下的战火。」
t_en: "A Chrysos Heir she stood. Divine blood soaked into the earth, quelling the flames beneath her feet."

t_ch: 他们的金血书写了悲惨的命运——但，我的金血会将这命运逆转！
t_en: Their golden blood wrote of a tragic fate. Mine shall overturn it!

t_ch: 「她的冠冕燃起辉光，比燃烧整座城邦的火更夺目。她高举权杖，人们朝她所指的方向望去——」
t_en: "Her crown burned bright, outshining the fires consuming the entire city. She raised her scepter high, and the people gazed in the direction she pointed..."

t_ch: 我已将金血分给你们。现在，英勇的同胞，跟随我，成为命运的主人！
t_en: My blood flows in you now! Heroic compatriots, follow me, and we'll seize the reins of fate!

t_ch: 去把敌人赶出刻法勒洒下的黎明，去用他们的尸身扑灭他们亲手扬起的火焰！去赢得光荣，赢得和平，让后人永远铭记你们伟大的壮举！——
t_en: Drive the enemy from Kephale's dawn! Smother their flames with their own dead! Win glory! Win peace! Let history sing your deeds!

t_ch: 「那紧随其后，率先起舞的，是一名身姿如游鱼的少女，穿梭于无边血海。」
t_en: "The first to dance was a maiden following closely behind, weaving through carnage like a fish in the sea."

t_ch: 「愤怒的人民随她汇成巨浪，汹涌澎湃。千万敌军如死水枯涸，灰灭无余。」
t_en: "The people full of wrath surged with her, forming a colossal wave, and the enemy hordes, drained of life, vanished into nothing."

t_ch: 去吧！去云石天宫，去黎明云崖！去向所有的恶徒和懦夫，和这泥古不化的时代宣告——
t_en: Onward! To Marmoreal Palace! To Dawncloud's heights! Announce to all the wicked and cowardly, announce to this stagnant age...

t_ch: 「我们——即是浪潮！」
t_en: "We... are the rising tide!"

t_ch: 「在史书中，这场战役被称作『第一次奥赫玛围城战』。据说，战争过后，人们在城中发现，被火烧过的每一处都显现出了同样的铭文。」
t_en: "History remembers this as the 'First Siege of Okhema'. It is said that after the flames died, people found identical inscriptions in every place in the city that had been scorched by fire."

t_ch: 「那是一个名字。它属于奥赫玛最初，亦是最后的僭主：『凯撒』刻律德菈。」
t_en: "It was the name borne by Okhema's first and final sovereign: the 'Imperator' Cerydra."

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，你在听吗？
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}? Are you listening?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…{NICKNAME}？
t_en: {NICKNAME}... {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: …真是的。明明是你说要复习一遍历史的，怎么自己睡着了呢？
t_en: ...Honestly. You were the one who insisted on reviewing history, yet here you are, dozing off?

t_ch: 快醒醒呀，要是再不起来，人家只能……
t_en: Wake up! Otherwise, I'll have to...

t_ch: …醒了呀，那就不对你使用唤醒的魔法了。
t_en: ...Awake at last? I guess I won't have to use my "wake up" magic on you then.

t_ch: 我只是在闭目养神。
t_en: I was meditating.

t_ch: 好吧，听你的~「闭目养神」。
t_en: Fine, as you say~ Just "meditating."

t_ch: 我们…这是在哪里？
t_en: Where... exactly are we?

t_ch: 记忆是梦的开场白…
t_en: Memories are the prelude to dreams...

t_ch: 在说什么，你的思绪怎么也回到过去啦？
t_en: What are you murmuring? Still lost in the past?

t_ch: 我们到目的地啦。熟悉的地点，命运三相殿。如果不出意外，现在应该是塔兰顿陨落后不久……
t_en: We've arrived. A familiar place... the Temple of the Three Fates. If everything went according to plan, it should be shortly after Talanton's fall...

t_ch: 同时，也是第一次逐火之旅的尾声。
t_en: And also the end of the first Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 该去找「律法」半神了。
t_en: The Law demigod awaits.

t_ch: 嗯。第一次逐火以「律法」的试炼作结，我们要在火种被归还前找到半神，取得对方的信任。
t_en: Indeed. The first Flame-Chase ended with the trial of Law. We must find the demigod and gain her trust before the Coreflame is restored.

t_ch: 尾声？我们来晚了？
t_en: The end? Are we late?

t_ch: 别担心，时间刚刚好。第一次逐火以「律法」的试炼作结，我们要在火种被归还前找到半神，取得对方的信任。
t_en: Perfect timing, actually. The first Flame-Chase ended with the trial of Law. We must find the demigod and gain her trust before the Coreflame is restored.

t_ch: 任务有些艰巨呢，得加快脚步啦。先想办法到奥赫玛去吧。那里人来人往，方便打听消息……
t_en: It'll be tricky, so let's pick up our pace. To Okhema first. We can learn more from the crowds there...

t_ch: 暴君！带着你的刽子手滚出去，这里不欢迎你们！
t_en: Tyrant! You and your butchers are not welcome here! Get out!

t_ch: 什么动静，有人在吵架？
t_en: What's that noise? A dispute?

t_ch: 小心，里面似乎有人在。
t_en: Careful. Sounds like someone's in there.

t_ch: 住口！你勾结悬锋，意图谋反，其罪当诛——
t_en: Hold your tongue! Conspiring with Kremnos and plotting rebellion are crimes punishable by death...

t_ch: 还不止一个人呢。气氛也很紧张，要是被卷入其中就麻烦了……
t_en: There are multiple voices, and things seem tense. Let's not get caught up in any trouble...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们先找个隐蔽的角落，躲起来观察下状况吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, why don't we find a place to hide and observe from the shadows?

t_ch: 你们这些流着金血的恶徒，曲解神谕，妄图弑神……
t_en: Golden-blooded defilers! Perverting the prophecy and trying to slay gods!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>什么天外的群星，创造泰坦的神明…看看这世道，被你们的暴行糟蹋成了什么样子！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Stars beyond the sky? Gods who created the Titans? What kind of nonsense! Look at this broken world, and see what your atrocious acts have done!</color>

t_ch: 什么？他…是不是提到了<color=#dbc291ff>天外的群星</color>？
t_en: What? Did he... just mention <color=#dbc291ff>the stars beyond the sky</color>?

t_ch: 这…怎么可能……
t_en: But... how is that possible...

t_ch: 混账——
t_en: You impudent...

t_ch: 断锋爵，我们来是为了迎见<color=#dbc291ff>「天外的救世主」</color>，别做多余的事。
t_en: Dux Fragoris! We're here to welcome the <color=#dbc291ff>Deliverer from beyond the sky</color>. Stand down.

t_ch: 疯了，真是疯了！除了伟大的塔兰顿，还有谁能拯救世人于水火之中——
t_en: Heretic! No one but the great Talanton can deliver this world from misery.

t_ch: 试问——
t_en: I ask you...

t_ch: ——倘若旧律完美无缺，又怎会被我轻易踏碎？
t_en: If the old laws were so perfect, why did they crumble beneath my feet?

t_ch: 你、你……
t_en: You... you...

t_ch: 塔兰顿已死。现在，我即是「律法」——
t_en: Talanton is long gone. Now, I am the Law...

t_ch: 挑战我，或服从我的判决。
t_en: Challenge me, or submit to my judgment.

t_ch: 断锋爵，将这人的骨灰收起来，撒到神殿和人群中去。
t_en: Dux Fragoris, take the ashes of this man and scatter them in the Temple among the crowds.

t_ch: 告诉人们：大祭司长利欲熏心，妄图夺回凯撒赋予众人的公民权，因而落得了凄惨的下场。
t_en: Tell them that the high priest attempted to take away the rights granted to the people by the Imperator. Thus, he met his fate.

t_ch: 是！
t_en: Yes, Imperator!

t_ch: 至于这两位误入法场的「客人」……
t_en: Now, these two accidental guests...

t_ch: 剑旗爵，动手吧。
t_en: Dux Gladiorum, if you please.

t_ch: 谨遵吩咐——
t_en: As you command...

t_ch: 这是要做什么？
t_en: What's going on?

t_ch: 等等，我们不是敌人…
t_en: Wait, we're not your enemies...

t_ch: 我就知道，又是这种开局。
t_en: Typical start, should've expected it.

t_ch: 咦，这是…？
t_en: Huh? Is this...?

t_ch: 尸体……
t_en: A corpse...

t_ch: …凯妮斯？！
t_en: ...Caenis!?

t_ch: 不错，但并非两位熟知的那位凯妮斯。
t_en: Correct, but not the Caenis you know.

t_ch: 此人是这个时代的「清洗者」首领。自黄金战争起，他们就以抹杀黄金裔为己任，即便如今我已扫合诸邦，这群虫豸也始终在阴影中蠢蠢欲动，妄图阻挠逐火征程……
t_en: This is the leader of the "Cleaners" in this era. Since the start of the Chrysos War, they've made it their mission to wipe out the Chrysos Heirs. Even now, even after I've united all the city-states, these vermin still lurk in the shadows, hindering the Flame-Chase Journey...

t_ch: 不仅如此，我还知道，其人第二十七名传承者和你们有不少过节，险些断送了第二次逐火之旅……
t_en: Moreover, I know that the <unbreak>27</unbreak>th person to inherit this role bore many grudges against you and nearly doomed the second Flame-Chase Journey...

t_ch: 所谓「敌人的敌人就是朋友」——为表敬意，我将此人尸首作为见面礼，献给二位。
t_en: The enemy of my enemy is my friend, so out of courtesy, I present to you this corpse as a gift.

t_ch: 你…认识我们？
t_en: You... You know us?

t_ch: 你知道第二次逐火之旅？
t_en: You know about the second Flame-Chase Journey?

t_ch: 这还真是一份…大礼。
t_en: Quite the... generous gift.

t_ch: 小心，我们先静观其变。她…恐怕是在给我们下马威呢。
t_en: Careful. Let's wait and see what happens. She's probably trying to scare us.

t_ch: 为尊卑有序，世人为我写下许多名号：止战的「燃冕者」、云崖的「独裁官」、圣城的「女皇」、逐火的「凯撒」。但鉴于两位的特殊身份，我准许你们直呼本名——
t_en: For the sake of order, I am known by many titles: "Flamecrowned" who ends wars, "Tyrant" of Dawncloud, "Empress" of the holy city, and "Imperator" of the Flame-Chase. But in light of your unique identities, I'll allow you to address me by my real name...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>刻律德菈</color>，谨代表我的土地和人民，向「救世主」致意。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Cerydra</color>. On behalf of my people and this land, greetings, "Deliverer."

t_ch: 恕我僭越，您…知道{F#她}{M#他}的身份？
t_en: If I may... how do you know {M#his}{F#her} identity?

t_ch: 不错。诚如{RUBY_B#缇宝}质子{RUBY_E#}神谕之所见：「『救世主』将自未来天外而来」。
t_en: As the little {RUBY_B#Tribbie}hostage{RUBY_E#} prophesied: "The Deliverer shall come from the future beyond the sky."

t_ch: 灰发、金眸、善使锤矛，于今日降临雅努萨波利斯，不会有错。
t_en: Gray hair, golden eyes, skilled in wielding a mace. They would arrive in Janusopolis on this day. There's no mistake.

t_ch: 神谕提到了「天外」…？
t_en: The prophecy mentions "beyond the sky"...?

t_ch: 缇宝预见了我们的到来？
t_en: Tribbie foresaw our arrival?

t_ch: 什么情况，这和历史完全不同…
t_en: This completely diverges from history...

t_ch: 该如何迎客，凯撒？
t_en: Your orders, Imperator?

t_ch: 班师回朝。派斥候向各邦代表传急讯，逐火同盟会议提前召开。
t_en: We return triumphant. Send an urgent message to all delegates: The meeting of the Flame-Chase Alliance will convene early.

t_ch: 至于二位——奥赫玛知道你们所求为何物。待回圣城，你我再从长计议。
t_en: As for you two, Okhema knows what you seek. We'll confer in the holy city.

t_ch: 想必两位有许多疑虑，但此地不宜闲谈，还请跟上我们的步伐。
t_en: Doubtless you have many questions, but save them for later. Please follow us.

t_ch: 这可真是…完全出乎意料的展开啊……
t_en: This is... not what I expected at all...

t_ch: 本该苦苦寻找的半神，竟然在等待我们的到来。而且，她不仅知道「天外」，还提到了…{RUBY_B#创造泰坦的神明}「星神」{RUBY_E#}？
t_en: The demigod we needed to find was just waiting for us. And she knows of things "beyond the sky"... even {RUBY_B#Gods who created the Titans}"Aeons"{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 怎么会这样，和过去三千万个翁法罗斯完全不同…是谁改变了历史？
t_en: How could this be so different from the previous thirty million Amphoreus cycles... Who altered history?

t_ch: 来古士，难道是他…
t_en: Lygus? Could he...

t_ch: 虽然不愿承认，但这种可能性确实存在……
t_en: Unpleasant thought, but plausible...

t_ch: 也许是三月七或丹恒…
t_en: Maybe March 7th or Dan Heng...

t_ch: 人家也希望是这样。只是，现在还不能排除其他可能……
t_en: I wish. But other possibilities remain...

t_ch: 莫非是我们搅乱了世界线…
t_en: Maybe we messed up the timeline...

t_ch: 这种事应该不会发生。我想，多半是有第三者插足，扰乱了局势……
t_en: Unlikely. I think it's probably a third party interfering...

t_ch: 岁月的流向变得好奇怪。无论是谁带来的影响，那位凯撒都是有备而来，反倒是我们陷入被动了呢……
t_en: The currents of time have become twisted. Regardless of who caused this, that "Imperator" came prepared. We're the ones at a disadvantage now...

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，现在不妨将计就计，先跟着他们回圣城吧。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, we might as well dance their dance. Let's go with them to the holy city.

t_ch: 因为你的特殊性，我们成了凯撒的贵宾，这是好事，奥赫玛人肯定会对你尊敬有加。只要好好运用这层身份，再加入一点你的经验和人格魅力……
t_en: We've received the Imperator's favor because of your unique background. As a result, the people of Okhema will certainly respect you more. Just put that to good use, and add a bit of your experience and charm...

t_ch: 不会比上一次更难，对吧？弄清楚这个轮回发生了什么，我们一定能反客为主，取回主导权。
t_en: Should be easier than last time, right? If we figure out what happened in this cycle, we'll be able to turn things back in our favor.

t_ch: 圣城也有许多逐火的同伴。
t_en: And old Flame-Chase companions await in the holy city.

t_ch: 对。缇宝、阿格莱雅…算算时间，这会儿说不定还有小赛飞儿呢。
t_en: Exactly. Tribbie, Aglaea... maybe even little Cipher.

t_ch: 「开拓」二周目，总有办法。
t_en: Trailblaze: The Sequel — we always find a way.

t_ch: 就是这样，进退有度，从容自信。这才是人家熟悉的{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Calm and confident. That's the {NICKNAME} I'm familiar with.

t_ch: 还要再加上你的魅力。
t_en: Can't do without your charm either.

t_ch: 原来关键在我吗？既然{NICKNAME}都这么说了…那人家必须全力以赴啦。
t_en: So I'm the key? Since you insist, {NICKNAME}... I'll give it my all!

t_ch: 「开拓」二周目，总有办法。
t_en: Trailblaze: The Sequel — we always find a way.

t_ch: 就是这样，进退有度，从容自信。这才是人家熟悉的{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Calm and confident. That's the {NICKNAME} I'm familiar with.

t_ch: …两位？
t_en: ...Guests, please.

t_ch: 救世之旅，始于足下……
t_en: The journey to save the world starts with a single step...

t_ch: 我们出发吧，伙伴？
t_en: Let's set off, my friend.

t_ch: 恭迎凯撒回銮！
t_en: Hail to the Imperator!

t_ch: 恭迎黄金英雄归城！
t_en: Hail to the golden heroes!

t_ch: 恭迎救世主造访！
t_en: Hail to the Deliverer!

t_ch: 看，人家没说错吧。这么大的阵仗，都是为了欢迎你呢。
t_en: Told you. You're the headline act. All this spectacle is for you.

t_ch: 有劳诸位镇守圣城。近况如何？
t_en: Guards, your service to the holy city is appreciated. How have things been?

t_ch: 报：悬锋城再度向边境发起进攻，「冬霖爵」已率军将敌寇击退。
t_en: Castrum Kremnos once again struck the border. Dux Brumalis led her troops to repel the enemy.

t_ch: 城内反对逐火的暴民仍在活跃。他们先前在云石市集闹事，砸毁周边店铺。戍卫队现已羁押主犯，留待问讯。
t_en: The agitators against the Flame-Chase are still active in the city. They smashed the shops around Marmoreal Market, but the Garrison already arrested the culprits, and now they await interrogation.

t_ch: 乌合之众而已，不必理会。就算{RUBY_B#「大地」的半神}荒笛{RUBY_E#}已亲身弥合了分裂的大地，他们也能找到千百种借口寻衅。
t_en: They are merely a disorderly mob and do not warrant any attention. Even though {RUBY_B#demigod of Earth}Terravox{RUBY_E#} personally mended the fractured earth, it still didn't silence these fools.

t_ch: 两位天外的贵客，无需在意这些琐事，先随剑旗爵前去安顿吧。
t_en: Guests from beyond the sky, worry not about these trivial matters. Dux Gladiorum will take you somewhere to settle down for now.

t_ch: 为两位献上迟来的自我介绍：我名为海瑟音，是宣誓效忠凯撒的「剑旗爵」，奥赫玛盟军的骑士统领。
t_en: Please allow me to belatedly introduce myself. My name is Hysilens, and I am the Dux Gladiorum who swears fealty to the Imperator, as well as the Knight Commander of the Okheman Alliance.

t_ch: 晚些时候，凯撒将邀请两位出席同盟会议，与各邦代表共谋逐火征程。正是阁下的到来令我们确信，神谕许诺的未来确凿无疑。在凯撒的统领下……
t_en: Later on, the Imperator will invite you to attend the meeting of delegates to discuss the Flame-Chase Journey. Your arrival has convinced us that the future promised by the prophecy is certain. Under the Imperator's command...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯必将挣脱束缚，走向天外之界。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus shall break its chains and reach the world beyond the sky.</color>

t_ch: 恕我冒昧，但各位对我们，还有「天外」…了解到什么程度呢？
t_en: With all due respect... what exactly do you know about us and what's "beyond the sky"?

t_ch: 身为人臣，我不便自作主张，随意表态。还望两位谅解。
t_en: As a humble subject, I cannot freely express my own views to you. Please forgive me.

t_ch: 果然不会那么顺利……
t_en: I knew it wouldn't be that easy...

t_ch: 时不我待。两位还是请先随我来，在会议前稍作歇息吧。
t_en: Time waits for no one. Please come with me and rest now before the meeting later.

t_ch: 凯撒治下的奥赫玛…完全走出了战火的阴影呢。
t_en: Okhema under the Imperator's rule... is no longer in the shadow of war.

t_ch: 正是。黎明云崖是众英雄的行宫，为使各位免于战事辛劳，凯撒为这座宫殿花了许多心思……
t_en: Indeed. Dawncloud stands as the heroes' residence. The Imperator put much thought into its design, in order for it to serve as a sanctuary from the burdens of battle...

t_ch: …至于个中细节，就请两位亲身体会吧。待凯撒驾临，我便会前来传唤各位。
t_en: ...Please experience its marvels firsthand, heroes. When the Imperator arrives, I shall come to summon you.

t_ch: 海瑟音小姐…真不愧是骑士统领。
t_en: Hysilens... No wonder she's the Knights' Commander.

t_ch: 真是守口如瓶。
t_en: Her lips are sealed tighter than armor.

t_ch: 真是令人安心。
t_en: She's reassuringly discreet.

t_ch: 刻律德菈一定是这么想的…但对我们来说，就不太方便啦。
t_en: I'm sure that's what Cerydra thinks, but it's inconvenient for us.

t_ch: 没关系，终于等到自由行动环节了。距离同盟会议还有段时间，我们可要开始行动咯？看那边……
t_en: Alright, we finally have some freedom to ourselves. Since there's still some time before the alliance meeting, let's explore a bit. Look over there...

t_ch: 是阿格莱雅，还有缇宝…
t_en: It's Aglaea, and Tribbie...

t_ch: 虽然不是你熟知的她们……
t_en: Not the ones you're familiar with...

t_ch: 虽然不是我熟知的她们…
t_en: Not the ladies I'm familiar with...

t_ch: 但要相信，每一个轮回的英雄们，都始终如一，从未变过呀。
t_en: But the hearts of heroes stay the same in every cycle, never changing.

t_ch: 阿雅，你今天也没什么精神……
t_en: Agy, you're still so listless today...

t_ch: 又一夜没睡吗？
t_en: Did you have trouble sleeping again?

t_ch: …是啊。
t_en: ...Yes.

t_ch: *我们*知道。泰坦为你送来了神谕…如果你希望，随时可以和*我们*聊聊，就像小时候那样。
t_en: We know. The Titans' prophecy haunts you... If you want, you can talk to us, just like when you were young.

t_ch: 无论发生什么，*我们*都不会离开你。
t_en: No matter what, we'll always remain by your side.

t_ch: 我知道，也明白命运从来颠扑不破。所以，我忧心的不是未来……
t_en: I know. I also understand that fate cannot be changed. It is not the future that I worry about...

t_ch: 昨夜彻夜未眠，只是在为难民们编织衣衫和浴巾罢了。黄金战争出于不义，粉碎了他们的尊严，但人们有权维持生活至细微处的体面。
t_en: I spent all last night weaving clothes and linen for the refugees. The Chrysos War is born of injustice and has shattered their dignity. They deserve at least some basic decency.

t_ch: 如果有一天，翁法罗斯连这些都能抛弃…那，无论是普通人、黄金裔，还是泰坦诸神，恐怕都与野兽无异了吧。
t_en: If Amphoreus one day abandons this... then all of us, commoners, Chrysos Heirs, Titans, become no better than beasts.

t_ch: 哦？有客人来了。二位好，我是阿格莱雅，爵名「金织」。
t_en: Oh? We have guests. Welcome. I am Aglaea, the Goldweaver.

t_ch: …这身行头可配不上「救世主」的名号。呵，看来得尽快为你们准备一身礼服了。
t_en: ...These rags on you are not worthy of the title of "Deliverer." I must prepare some proper attire for you.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅，好久不见。
t_en: It's been a while, Aglaea.

t_ch: 怎么了？你的眼神似乎有些陌生。
t_en: What is the matter? Your gaze seems somewhat unsure.

t_ch: 你好，初次见面。
t_en: Hello. Nice to meet you for the first time.

t_ch: 是吗？你的眼神似乎不是这么说的。
t_en: First time? That's not what I gather from your eyes.

t_ch: 难道你认识的「阿格莱雅」，同我相比十分不同吗？
t_en: Does your "Aglaea" differ so much from me?

t_ch: 你好，天外的救世主。*我们*是雅努萨波利斯的缇宝，很高兴认识你们……
t_en: Greetings, Deliverer from beyond the sky. We are Tribbie of Janusopolis. It's very nice to meet you...

t_ch: 话虽如此，应该不用多做自我介绍啦。*我们*知道，你见证过逐火之旅的「未来」——远比我们眼中的预言更加清晰。
t_en: Although introductions are probably unnecessary. We know you've witnessed the future of the Flame-Chase Journey, even more clearly than we have.

t_ch: 见证过逐火的未来？这…也是神谕的内容吗？
t_en: Witnessed the future of the Flame-Chase Journey? The prophecy also told you about that?

t_ch: 是呀，<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>凭借这一道神谕彻底改变了翁法罗斯。不过，其中关于「救世主」的部分，除了你的外貌和降临时间，就没有更多细节了。
t_en: Indeed! <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color> reshaped Amphoreus through the prophecy. Although, regarding the Deliverer... there were not many details beyond your appearance and the time of your arrival.

t_ch: 所以，千万不要有负担，请放松放松再放松。
t_en: So, please don't worry. Feel free to relax and relax some more.

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯的神谕？
t_en: Oronyx's prophecy?

t_ch: 正是欧洛尼斯告诉人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
t_en: It was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.

t_ch: 不是刻法勒吗？
t_en: Wasn't it Kephale?

t_ch: 刻法勒也降下过神谕。但只有欧洛尼斯告诉过人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
t_en: Kephale issued prophecies too, but it was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.

t_ch: 不仅如此，它还揭示了与「再创世」截然不同的未来。
t_en: More crucially, they revealed a future entirely different from the Era Nova.

t_ch: 虽然都需要挑战诸神，但在「岁月」的神谕中，我们不会步入新世界，而是前往<color=#dbc291ff>真正的星空</color>……
t_en: Though we still must challenge the gods... in the Time Titan's prophecy, this path leads not to a new world but to the <color=#dbc291ff>true starry skies</color>...

t_ch: 这也是凯撒大人的毕生所求。你们的到来，更是印证了这一点呀。
t_en: This is also what the Great Imperator has been striving for all her life. Your arrival further confirms everything.

t_ch: 这还真是…令人吃惊。
t_en: This... can't be real.

t_ch: 连你们都觉得意外吗？命运…真是捉摸不透呀。
t_en: Even you find this surprising? Fate... really is unpredictable.

t_ch: 或许在接下来的同盟会议上，还会有更多不可思议的事发生吧。
t_en: Perhaps the upcoming meeting will hold even more surprises.

t_ch: 天外之人已至，命运逐一应验。想来，「浪漫」的试炼也近在眼前了……
t_en: The one from beyond the sky has arrived, and destiny continues to be fulfilled. The Trial of Romance is also close at hand...

t_ch: 不要难过…让*我们*唱首童谣吧！阿雅乖乖，把心门开开……
t_en: Please don't worry... We'll sing you a lullaby! Little Agy be a good girl and open your heart...

t_ch: …我已经不是小孩子啦，吾师。
t_en: ...I outgrew nursery rhymes long ago, Teacher.

t_ch: 救世的英雄…要怎么和他们说话，他们会不会很咄、咄咄逼人？
t_en: How are we supposed to talk to the heroes of Deliverance... What if they're really... intimidating?

t_ch: 维吉妮娅，没什么好怕的，你只要把吟诗的气场拿出来——啊，两位英雄已经来了？
t_en: Verginia, don't be so nervous. Once they hear your poetry... Ah! Heroes, you're already here?

t_ch: 幸会，我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军的参谋。
t_en: Greetings. I am Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.

t_ch: 这位是来自悬锋城的「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，凯撒大人的御用史官。
t_en: This is Verginia of Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and imperial scribe of the Great Imperator.

t_ch: 你、你们好，我叫维吉妮娅，我会吟风…啊不，吟、吟诗。
t_en: H—Hello! I'm Verginia... I compost... I mean, compose! I compose poetry.

t_ch: 我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是救世主{NICKNAME}。很高兴认识二位。
t_en: I'm Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer, {NICKNAME}. Nice to meet you both.

t_ch: {M#他们}{F#她们}好像确实没有流言中的那么…可怕。
t_en: They're not as frightening as the rumors claimed.

t_ch: 这是我们第一次踏上凯撒治下的土地。好惊人，奥赫玛比想象中还要宏伟好多…要是没有各位一路关照，我们恐怕早就晕头转向啦。
t_en: This is our first time in the Imperator's realm. Okhema is even more magnificent than we imagined... If you all weren't here to look after us, we'd be completely lost and confused.

t_ch: 呵呵，诸位想象中的奥赫玛已经是过去式了。在凯撒的治理下，这座城邦已经迎来新生，成为名副其实的「世界之都」。
t_en: Hehe, the Okhema you imagined is long gone. Under the Imperator, this city has been reborn as the "Capital of the World."

t_ch: 好好享受她自由的风吧，两位。任何人…只要为凯撒尽到应尽的义务，这风便会永远为他驻足。
t_en: Bask in her free-spirited winds. For anyone who fulfills their duties to the Imperator, these winds shall forever remain at their service.

t_ch: 嗯？那如果……
t_en: Hmm? But what if...

t_ch: 忠诚之人从来不思考背叛的下场。但如果诸位实在好奇，不妨去湖边看看吧——
t_en: Those who are loyal do not need to consider the consequences of betrayal. But if you're curious, why not head to the lake and take a look?

t_ch: 那些沉尸水底的元老，就是忤逆凯撒者最好的表率。
t_en: Those Elders who lie at the bottom of the lake are the best example of what happens when you disobey the Imperator.

t_ch: 但别担心，凯撒很看重你们。假以时日，定会让维吉妮娅也给二位写几首赞美诗呢！
t_en: Fear not, the Imperator favors you. Verginia will write songs in your honor!

t_ch: 阿波罗尼总是这样，说话一点都不诗意……
t_en: Apollonius, where's your poetic flair?

t_ch: …「冬霖爵」，凯撒大人刚刚找出了主谋，将他当众处刑——看到那混账被烧得连渣都不剩，估计这群刁民也不敢再放肆了。
t_en: ...Dux Brumalis, our Great Imperator found the mastermind and executed him in public. Seeing that scoundrel burned to nothing should deter these miscreants from being so brazen again.

t_ch: 哼，凯撒大人也不怕脏了自己的手…可笑的排场。
t_en: Tch, so the Great Imperator isn't afraid of getting her hands dirty... What a ridiculous display.

t_ch: 你懂什么？子民犯下再大的罪孽，也是凯撒的子民，当然需由凯撒亲手审判——
t_en: What do you know? No matter what sins the people commit, they are still the Imperator's people, and it's only right that they be judged by the Imperator's own hand.

t_ch: ——啊，是你们！擅闯法场的贵客！
t_en: Ah! Our distinguished trespassing guests!

t_ch: 是「擅闯」，还是「贵客」？
t_en: Are we trespassers or guests?

t_ch: 是你…谁来着？
t_en: Who are you again?

t_ch: 我叫拉比努斯，你这贵客！
t_en: I am Labienus, honored guest!

t_ch: 「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，请多指教。
t_en: Seneca, the Dux Brumalis. Greetings.

t_ch: 这位「冬霖爵」好像没那么向着凯撒，又身居高位。旁边的「断锋爵」…语言系统也有些特别……
t_en: This "Dux Brumalis" doesn't seem to like the Imperator very much, but she holds a high rank. As for this "Dux Fragoris," his way of speaking seems rather unusual too.

t_ch: …让人家套点话试试看吧。
t_en: Let me see what I can get out of them...

t_ch: 我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是{NICKNAME}！我们初来乍到，人生地不熟，想向您请教一件事……
t_en: I'm Cyrene of Aedes Elysiae. This is {NICKNAME}. We're new here and wanted to ask you...

t_ch: 这城中是否还有像{M#他}{F#她}一样，来自天外的客人？那是我们的挚友，此行前来……
t_en: Does this city host any other visitors from beyond the sky? We're looking for our dear companions...

t_ch: 哼，拙劣的谎言就不必再续了。但这城中确实有人对天外了如指掌……
t_en: Hmph, drop the charade. But yes, there is someone in this city who is all too familiar with the world beyond the sky...

t_ch: 住口！你疯了？凯撒有令，那位大人的行踪务必严格保密！
t_en: Silence! The Imperator ordered us to keep that Lord's whereabouts a secret!

t_ch: 得了吧，哈巴狗！你就连要用狗嘴吠出什么声调，都得请示那该死的凯撒吗？
t_en: Enough, you pathetic lapdog! Do you need to beg for permission from that cursed Imperator even just to bark?
Y—You...

t_ch: 对天外了如指掌，还被称作「那位大人」，难道是…？
t_en: Someone who is all too familiar with the world beyond the sky and is referred to as "that Lord"... Could it be...?

t_ch: 我来斫断你这无礼之徒的冰碴子！
t_en: Insolent brat, I'll shatter that ice of yours!

t_ch: 我来冻上你这愚忠之人的脑瓜子！
t_en: Groveling fool, I'll freeze that brain of yours!

t_ch: 天外之海的鱼儿们，在湖中歇息得如何？
t_en: Little fish from beyond the sky, did you rest well?

t_ch: 凯撒与城邦代表们即将入场，若准备妥帖，便随我一同游去议会吧。
t_en: The Imperator and the delegates are about to arrive. If you are ready, please follow me to the meeting.

t_ch: 天外之海的鱼儿们，在湖中歇息得如何？
t_en: Little fish from beyond the sky, did you rest well?

t_ch: 距离会议开始还有些时间，与其去听城邦代表们的嘁嚓细语，不如先认识下未来的战友吧。
t_en: There is still some time before the meeting begins. Rather than listening to the whispers of the delegates, why don't you get to know your future comrades first?

t_ch: 现在出发。
t_en: Let's go now.

t_ch: 那就来吧，凯撒已为你们留好了席位。
t_en: Then come. The Imperator reserved seats for you.

t_ch: 同盟会议…感觉有些紧张起来了呢。
t_en: I'm starting to feel a bit nervous about the meeting.

t_ch: 既然是刻律德菈主持的会议，想必是个了解「律法」动向和当今时代的好机会…我们可都要竖起耳朵，好好听哦？
t_en: Since Cerydra is presiding over the meeting, it'll be a good opportunity to learn about the Law's inclinations and the current era. Let's keep our ears open, okay?

t_ch: 关于你的身份…
t_en: About your role...

t_ch: 我是奥赫玛的骑士统领，逐火军的大将，也是凯撒的近侍——
t_en: I'm the Knight Commander of Okhema, General of the Flame-Chase Army, and the Imperator's servant...

t_ch: 除却这些刻着繁复名号的鳞片，我只是凯撒身侧的一尾游鱼，一柄剑旗。
t_en: But beneath these shiny scales engraved with complicated titles? I am just a swordfish at the Imperator's side.

t_ch: 关于凯撒…
t_en: About the Imperator...

t_ch: 如你所见，她是奥赫玛的女皇，黄金战争的终结者，黄金裔的领袖。
t_en: As you've witnessed, she is the empress of Okhema, the one who ended the Chrysos War, and the leader of the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 其余更多，我身为臣子不便妄议。
t_en: As merely a humble subject, I cannot say more beyond this.

t_ch: 关于这里的黄金裔…
t_en: About the Chrysos Heirs here...

t_ch: 在这里的黄金裔，皆是逐火军中的佼佼者——
t_en: The Chrysos Heirs here constitute the elite among the Flame-Chase Army...

t_ch: 「曳石爵」阿波罗尼与「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，他们是逐火军的参谋与史官，一人为凯撒出谋献计，一人将她的无上功绩书作诗篇。
t_en: "Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius and "Dux Carminum" Verginia serve as the army's advisor and historian, respectfully. One offers advice and counsel to the Imperator while the other writes verses of her supreme glory.

t_ch: 「断锋爵」拉比努斯与「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，他们是逐火军中强大的战士，用剑刃与风暴扫清逐火的前路。
t_en: "Dux Fragoris" Labienus and "Dux Brumalis" Seneca are both formidable warriors, clearing the way for the Flame-Chase with steel and storm.

t_ch: 「命运爵」，知晓神谕的圣女，现在城中只有名为缇宝的这一位。为统合天下神谕，凯撒曾将她们掳作质子…不过，她们如今是奥赫玛重要的先知。
t_en: Dux Fatorum, the Holy Maiden who interprets the prophecy... Only the one named Tribbie remains in the city. The Imperator once took them as hostages in order to unify the prophecies of the world... But they are now Okhema's most vital prophets.

t_ch: 「金织爵」阿格莱雅…呵，她不喜欢被人背后议论，你还是亲自去认识她吧。
t_en: "Dux Goldweaver" Aglaea... Well, she dislikes it when people talk about her behind her back. You should get to know her in person.

t_ch: 待会儿再来…
t_en: I'll come back later...

t_ch: 抱歉啦，让我们再逛逛这个美丽的地方吧～
t_en: Apologies. We want to explore this beautiful place some more~

t_ch: 好吧，请别让凯撒等太久。
t_en: Very well, just don't keep the Imperator waiting.

t_ch: 既然还有时间，就让我们再认识一下这里的朋友吧～
t_en: Since there's still some time, let's get to know our new friends here~

t_ch: 嗯，不必着急。
t_en: Alright. There's no rush.

t_ch: 帕福斯的兄弟，你说这凯撒提前召开会议，又要干什么？我的家乡可经不起折腾了……
t_en: Good sir from Paphas, what do you think the Imperator is planning, calling this meeting so early? My homeland can't endure anymore...

t_ch: 谁知道呢。先说要狩猎泰坦，又说有什么更大的灾厄…我看她的疯病才是最大的灾厄。
t_en: Who knows? First she wants to hunt Titans, now she says there are even greater calamities... Her madness is the greatest calamity.

t_ch: 哼，可不是吗！又是黄金裔，又是「救世主」…我们这些凡人在她眼里到底算什么？
t_en: Exactly! Chrysos Heirs, "Deliverers"... What about us ordinary folk? How much are we worth in her eyes?

t_ch: 气氛还真是凝重啊……
t_en: Things feel pretty tense here...

t_ch: 记得史书上说，凯撒当年是靠着三门火炮，瞄准黎明云崖，让所有城邦代表乖乖听话的。不知在这个轮回，历史会不会重演呢？
t_en: The history books said that the Imperator aimed three cannons at Dawncloud to make all the delegates obey her. Will history repeat itself in this cycle?

t_ch: 凯撒确实做过类似的事，而且不止一次。不过，至于历史是否会重演…二位稍后便会明白了。
t_en: Yes, similar acts have occurred, and not just once. However, whether history will repeat itself... you'll soon see.

t_ch: 那是留给二位的特等席，敬请落座。
t_en: Those are the two spots reserved for you. Please take your seats.

t_ch: *诸代表议论纷纷*
t_en: *Representatives chattering*

t_ch: 诸君，请肃静。凯撒已驾临她忠诚的议会，同盟会议即将开始。
t_en: Ladies and gentlemen, silence please. The Imperator has arrived before her faithful council, and the alliance meeting is about to begin.

t_ch: 全体起立！以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名，奥赫玛同盟向诸神宣誓——
t_en: All rise! In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, the Okhema Alliance swears upon the gods...

t_ch: 不必多此一举了。凯撒不向败者祈祷。
t_en: Cease the pageantry. I pray not to the vanquished.

t_ch: 什么……
t_en: What...

t_ch: 刻法勒自不必多说。两日前的{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，斥候本应准时抵达奥赫玛，为诸位带来「律法」已被征服的捷报……
t_en: Kephale, of course, needs no further explanation. As for the subjugation of the "Law," at the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} two days past, a scout should've brought the news to all of you...

t_ch: 但令人遗憾的是，戍卫在城外不远处的乱石堆中发现了他的遗体。
t_en: Unfortunately, guards found his corpse among the rocks not far from the city.

t_ch: 不仅如此，还有一柄帕福斯弯刀给那可怜人做了陪葬。我实在难以想象，这位忠诚的战士临死前受了多少折磨……
t_en: Moreover, the poor soul was buried with a Paphas curved blade. It pains me to imagine what agonies this loyal warrior endured before his death...

t_ch: 帕福斯代表，你对此有何高见？
t_en: Delegate from Paphas, do you have any insights?

t_ch: 什、什么？我从未得知此事……
t_en: I—I know nothing of this...

t_ch: 铁证如山，不必白费口舌了。不过，这场审判先按下不表——
t_en: The evidence is irrefutable, so there is no need to waste your breath. However, let us set this trial aside for the time being...

t_ch: 诸君已经看到了：在这世上最神圣、最庄严的议院中，就在我们之间，竟有人想要将屠刀挥向对方，公然挑衅同盟，摧毁来之不易的团结与和平……
t_en: Witness! Even within the most sacred and dignified Council, there were those among us who wished to draw their blades, brazenly challenging the alliance, seeking to shatter our hard-earned peace and unity...

t_ch: 不幸中的万幸，我发现了这一切。现在，为了守卫这座美丽城市和她的人民，凯撒的军团已经做好准备——
t_en: Fortunately, I uncovered this plot. Now, to protect this beautiful city and her people, the Imperator's legions are ready...

t_ch: ——各位将会在他们的护送下，迁往命运三相殿，并在那里接受同盟最高规格的保护。
t_en: They will escort each of you to the Temple of the Three Fates, where you will receive the highest level of protection the alliance can offer.

t_ch: 而后，军团的勇士将随我一道，踏上讨伐{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的征程。
t_en: Then, the legions' warriors will join me in embarking on the campaign against {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 这…这分明是个圈套！
t_en: This... this is clearly a trap!

t_ch: 凯撒！你叫我们前来，只是为了践踏盟友的尊严么！
t_en: Imperator! Did you summon us here just to trample on the dignity of your allies!?

t_ch: *诸代表议论纷纷*
t_en: *Representatives chattering*

t_ch: 场面变得焦灼起来了呀……
t_en: Things are starting to get pretty intense...

t_ch: 同胞们，你们都看清她的嘴脸了！依照奥赫玛旧律，只有经三分之二多数元老同意，军团才能执行总帅的命令……
t_en: Comrades, you've all seen her true face now! According to the ancient laws of Okhema, only with the consent of two-thirds of the Elders can the legions carry out the commander's orders...

t_ch: 呵，旧律！你们不早就把它毁了么？你们在奥赫玛第一次围城战时临阵倒戈，在重组元老院的决议中全部投下赞成票，还在昨天亲手用染血的刀锋亵渎了它——
t_en: Heh, the ancient laws! Didn't you destroy them long ago? You defected during the First Siege of Okhema, voted unanimously in favor of the Council of Elders' restructuring, and just yesterday, you desecrated them with a blood-stained blade...

t_ch: ——腐朽的旧律已随着{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}一同陨落，不再配得尊敬。但，倘若诸位还坚持标榜自己捍卫「律法」……
t_en: The decaying old laws fell with {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and are no longer deserving of respect. But, if you still insist on proclaiming yourselves defenders of the "Law"...

t_ch: 那便就此噤声，向我手中这枚火种献上最高的敬意。
t_en: Then be silent, and offer up the highest respect to this Coreflame in my hand.

t_ch: 「律法」的火种，果然在她手里……
t_en: That really is the Coreflame of "Law" in her hand...

t_ch: *诸代表鸦雀无声*
t_en: *The representatives fell silent*

t_ch: 既然在场诸位均无异议…那么，本次会议的原定议题——「讨伐法吉娜」——也视同通过。
t_en: Since there are no objections... then the original agenda of this meeting — "the campaign against Phagousa" — is hereby passed.

t_ch: 逐火军对海洋泰坦的狩猎，即日开始。限同盟诸邦于长夜月内交出军权，并缴齐战税，以便筹备战事。
t_en: The Flame-Chase Army's hunt for the Ocean Titan begins today. In order to prepare for war, all allied city-states must surrender command of their militaries and pay all war taxes by the end of the Month of Evernight.

t_ch: 以此契机，并请各位见过我同盟新至的贵客——
t_en: At this moment, I would also like to introduce to everyone the newest honored guest to join our alliance...

t_ch: 「岁月」神谕中揭示的「救世主」，{NICKNAME}，已从天外降临。我等将在救世主的助力下，击碎满溢之杯——
t_en: The "Deliverer" revealed in the prophecy of "Time," {NICKNAME}, has descended from beyond the sky. With {M#his}{F#her} aid, we shall shatter the Chalice of Plenty...

t_ch: 令法吉娜的火种，归于圣城！
t_en: And return Phagousa's Coreflame to the holy city!

t_ch: *诸代表议论纷纷*
t_en: *Representatives chattering*

t_ch: 荒谬…简直荒谬！
t_en: Absurd... simply absurd!

t_ch: 什么天外的救世主，这一切都和那弑神的神谕一样…是你用来滋养权力的谎言！
t_en: A Deliverer from beyond the sky? This is just like that prophecy about slaying gods... It's a lie you've used to grow your power!

t_ch: 拉冬已经牺牲了无数将士…还要我将更多同胞交由这暴君役使吗？
t_en: Ladon has already sacrificed countless soldiers... And now you want me to send even more of my brothers and sisters to be used and discarded by a tyrant?
Hah...

t_ch: 还有哪位盟友有异议吗？
t_en: Are there any other objections?

t_ch: 那么，祝诸君安好…散会。
t_en: Then, I bid you all farewell... Meeting adjourned.

t_ch: 救世主，留步——
t_en: Deliverer, please wait...

t_ch: 我还有要事与二位商议。
t_en: I still have important matters to discuss with the two of you.

t_ch: 方才的会议犹如闹剧，见笑了。
t_en: I apologize for that farce of a meeting.

t_ch: 每天要和这么多人打交道…凯撒大人真是辛苦呀。
t_en: It must be tiring, dealing with so many people every day, Great Imperator.

t_ch: 辛苦？呵，错了。
t_en: Tiring? Hah, you're mistaken.

t_ch: 部署棋局、左右下注，这运筹帷幄的游戏，反倒能为此世沉重的命运平添一抹亮色，就像统治和征服本就伴随着牺牲。
t_en: Moving chess pieces, placing wagers... this game of strategy adds a dash of color to our heavy fates, much like how rule and conquest are always accompanied by sacrifice.

t_ch: 和泰坦的战争，也算是牺牲的一部分吗？
t_en: Is the war with the Titans also part of that sacrifice?

t_ch: 呵，在我窥见此世…不，天外的秘密以后，翁法罗斯的神权早已无足轻重。
t_en: Hah, after I glimpsed the secrets of this world... no, the secrets beyond the sky, the divine authority of Amphoreus no longer held any significance.

t_ch: 我问你，救世主：于这翁法罗斯的天幕之外，存在名为「星神」的宏伟神祇——此事为真？
t_en: Let me ask you, Deliverer: Is it true that, beyond Amphoreus's sky, there are magnificent deities called "Aeons"?

t_ch: 星神存在，这是事实。
t_en: Aeons exist. That's a fact.

t_ch: 啊…「事实」二字，从未如此令人迷醉。
t_en: Ah... the word "fact" has never been so intoxicating.

t_ch: 祂们的权能比泰坦强大万倍。
t_en: THEIR powers are a thousand times greater than the Titans'.

t_ch: 啊…那的确令人神往。
t_en: Ah... that certainly captivates my interest.

t_ch: 你…是从谁那儿听说的？
t_en: Where... did you hear this from?

t_ch: 啊…所以，祂们的确存在。
t_en: Ah... so THEY do indeed exist.

t_ch: 那么，请再告诉我：你将如何运用此种伟力，引领世人……
t_en: Then, please tell me more: How will you use this great power to guide the people...?

t_ch: 在你描绘的未来中，我们逐火的征程将通向何方？
t_en: In the future you envision, where will our Flame-Chase Journey lead?

t_ch: 保护火种，还有「律法」…
t_en: Protect the Coreflames, and the "Law"...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯才能挣脱「毁灭」。
t_en: Only then can Amphoreus break free from "the Destruction."

t_ch: …哦？你们当下需要的…是「律法」的力量？
t_en: ...Oh? What you require now... is the power of "Law"?

t_ch: 正是。诚如神谕所示，{NICKNAME}是来自天外的救世主。不仅如此，{F#她}{M#他}还有可靠的盟友。
t_en: Exactly. Just as the prophecy foretold, {NICKNAME} is your Deliverer from beyond the sky. And {F#s}he also has reliable allies.

t_ch: 如果能让他们介入翁法罗斯的「律法」，就有机会改变未来的命运，扭转这个世界注定的结局。
t_en: If they can intervene in Amphoreus's "Laws," we may have a chance to alter this world's impending fate and reverse its destined end.

t_ch: 哈…哈哈哈！
t_en: Ha... Hahahaha!

t_ch: 很好，救世主，你很有胆识！明知「律法」的继承者就站在你眼前，竟还敢如此放肆——
t_en: Very good, Deliverer, you have courage! To say such presumptuous things, even knowing that the inheritor of the "Law" stands before you...

t_ch: 您的意思是……
t_en: You mean...

t_ch: 换做从前，若有人胆敢觊觎凯撒神权，多半只会落得碎尸万段的下场。但如今，我们的视线已能越过这片苟延残喘的大地……
t_en: In the past, anyone who dared to covet the Imperator's divine authority would have met a gruesome end. But now, we can see beyond this dying world...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我们的征程…也不应再被这顽固的天幕制约。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Our journey... should no longer be confined below this stubborn sky.</color>

t_ch: 无奈，那反复无常的海洋泰坦阻断了通往创世涡心的灵水，给我的晋升之路徒增阻碍。若「律法」火种不能归还，你们指明的救世之路亦无法实现……
t_en: Alas, that fickle Ocean Titan has obstructed the spirit water leading to the Vortex of Genesis, hindering my ascension. If the Coreflame of "Law" cannot be returned, your path to Deliverance will never be realized...

t_ch: 事至如今，我们也该再起停滞的征程…令拦路的浪潮退去了。
t_en: Now that things have come to this, we must resume our once-stagnant journey... and force the waves that block our way to recede.

t_ch: 所以…您答应与我们合作了？
t_en: So... you agree to cooperate with us?

t_ch: 合作？恕我直言，我从来不和任何人*合作*……
t_en: Cooperate? Forgive me, but I never "cooperate" with anyone...

t_ch: 但，我允许诸位以王臣的身份与我踏上征程——随我铸就最完美的「律法」。
t_en: Though, I will permit you to join me as subjects and together, we will forge the most perfect "Law."

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: This is...

t_ch: 「逐火铭牌」，逐火军的身份象征。奥赫玛每位王爵都持有此物。
t_en: The "Flame-Chase Medallion," a symbol of the Flame-Chase Army. Every noble in Okhema carries one.

t_ch: 见到此牌就等于见到凯撒本人，你们可以在城中随意行动。启程征伐海洋泰坦前，两位就在奥赫玛暂时休憩吧。
t_en: This medallion represents the will of the Imperator herself, and you may act freely within the city with it. Before we embark on the crusade against the Ocean Titan, you should rest in Okhema for a time.

t_ch: 小心一个叫来古士的人，凯撒。
t_en: Be wary of someone named Lygus, Imperator.

t_ch: 你的谏言，我收下了。
t_en: Your advice is acknowledged.

t_ch: 感谢你的信任，凯撒。
t_en: Thank you for your trust, Imperator.

t_ch: 所谓信任和忠诚，于我耳中皆为虚言。
t_en: So-called trust and loyalty are but empty words to me.

t_ch: 今后就用行动证明自己吧。只要不行僭越之举，我会充分尊重臣子一切选择。
t_en: From this moment on, prove yourself through your actions. As long as no boundaries are crossed, I fully respect the choices of my subjects.

t_ch: 愿您的征途踏尽漫天繁星，凯撒大人。
t_en: May your journey reach that sky full of stars, Great Imperator.

t_ch: 呵，你这位跟班着实懂得如何讨人欢喜啊。
t_en: Hah, your attendant certainly knows how to curry favor.

t_ch: 去吧，先沐浴一番。你们身上…咳，有一股海潮的腥味。
t_en: Go now, take a bath first. You two... ahem, reek of seawater.

t_ch: 出来吧，「神礼官」。
t_en: Come forth, "Theoros."

t_ch: 遵命——
t_en: Yes...

t_ch: 伟大的凯撒。
t_en: Great Imperator.

t_ch: 现在，或许您愿意听取我的谏言了？
t_en: Now, perhaps you're willing to hear my counsel?
Hah...

t_ch: 如欧洛尼斯说的那般，那两人来了。也正如你所说，他们展现出了对「律法」的渴求……
t_en: Those two arrived just as Oronyx described. And just as you said, they showed a thirst for "Law"...

t_ch: 至少，这证明我的判断没有错：<color=#dbc291ff>留你一命是正确的选择。</color>
t_en: At least, this proves that my judgment was right: <color=#dbc291ff>Sparing your life was the correct decision.</color>

t_ch: 呵呵，您再次证实了凯撒的英明并非空谈。
t_en: Heh, you've once again confirmed that your wisdom is no empty boast.

t_ch: 如今，又一个选择摆在您的面前：该与何人协作，让「律法」的天秤偏向哪方——<color=#dbc291ff>我，抑或那位「救世主」？</color>
t_en: Now, another choice lies before you: With whom shall you ally to tip the scales of "Law": <color=#dbc291ff>me, or that "Deliverer"?</color>

t_ch: 再提醒我一次吧，安提基色拉人——在你的视野里，这两条路分别通向何种未来？
t_en: Remind me again, Antikytheran, what kind of future do these two paths lead to, in your view?

t_ch: 遵命。
t_en: I shall tell you.
